100-word review: The film that redefined the superhero genre. Nolan delivers a relentless pace;The Dark Knightnever lets up, weaving action, drama, and moral complexity with precision. At the heart of the film is, of course, Heath Ledger’s astonishing performance as Joker. Ledger disappears into the role, creating a chaotic, mesmerising villain whose every scene crackles with intensity. His portrayal is both terrifying and strangely magnetic — a career-defining performance that more than earned its posthumous accolades. Christian Bale plays Batman with conviction, but it’s Ledger’s Joker who steals the spotlight. Not just a great superhero movie, but a great movie, period.
